description: Determines the properties of the creature's extra defense. Roll once on this table for commonality. Then determine type: 1-50 against an attack form, 51-100 against an effect.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's extra defense. Roll once on this table for commonality. Then determine type: 1-50 against an attack form, 51-100 against an effect.

entries.description: The defense is against a common effect or attack, such as metal weapons.

descriptionTranslations.en: The defense is against a common effect or attack, such as metal weapons.

entries.description: The defense is against a less common, though not rare, effect or attack, like puncture wounds.

descriptionTranslations.en: The defense is against a less common, though not rare, effect or attack, like puncture wounds.

entries.description: The defense is against a rare effect or attack, such as magical attacks.

descriptionTranslations.en: The defense is against a rare effect or attack, such as magical attacks.
